name: @mx-loom/golden
description: mx-loom GOLDEN end-to-end test (T114, the M1 exit gate). The one test that exercises every boundary: a scripted Claude-SDK-shaped cognition delegates a named tool AND a guarded command to a second registered agent across a workspace room, hits the receiver's approval gate, an out-of-band operator decides, the result returns, and the audit rows land — run through BOTH bindings (the @mx-loom/mcp server and the @mx-loom/claude in-process shim) against the same live two-daemon golden fixture. Test-only: nothing is exported for downstream consumption.
